eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Kansas; at 6:13 AM on APR 16, 2019 Effective until 7:13 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is the required weekly test for the Kansas Division of Emergency Management. The only action required by recipients in the state of Kansas is to log this test.
